variants: Dana Said was born in Olivebranch Hills, where they cultivated a passion for innovation from a young age. This passion led them to create the Frostpetal Recording Panel, an innovative device that captured breathtaking moments in nature. Currently, Dana resides in Sproutwood Terrace, where they continue to explore their creative pursuits. Their contributions to the field of nature documentation earned them the prestigious Falconheart Trophy. As an active member of the Emerald Enchanters Forum, Dana shares their expertise and engages with fellow enthusiasts in their field.
